title: Shipping Officer
description:
Job Highlights

  • Medical & Dental Benefits
  • Lunch Subsidiary
  • Recreation Exercise Group (Yoga / Pilates)

Job Description

  • Attending to customers’ enquiries and feedback
  • Follow-up and advise customers on shipment status
  • Handle import & export shipping documentation and process
  • Able to resolve customer complaints in professional manner
  • Liaison and co-ordination with internal divisions and customers
  • Handle permits declaration

Job Requirements

  • Diploma holders, preferably and specialized in Logistics / Supply Chain or equivalent
  • Working experience in shipping, supply chain or logistics will be an added advantage
  • Work independently and able to work in a fast pace environment
  • Team player and dynamic, ability to multi-task
  • Good communication and organization skills
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications
  • Able to speak and write Chinese-language for the essential purpose of communicating with Taiwan HQ.

We regret that will be treated with strict confidence. Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Under the Personal Data Protection Act, for Personal Information you should only provide your Name (As in NRIC) , Residential Address, Contact Number and Email address in your Resume.

By submitting any application or resume to us, you will deemed to have agreed and consented to us collecting, using, retaining and disclosing your personal information to the company's consideration.

postedCompany.description:
Evergreen Marine (Asia) Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-flag container shipping company with headquarters in Singapore. Established in March 22, 2021, wholly owned by Evergreen Marine Corporation (Taiwan) Ltd., a public listed company in Taiwan.

Evergreen Marine (Asia) Pte. Ltd. market its global container services under the brand name ‘Evergreen Line’, together with Evergreen Marine Corp.(Taiwan) Ltd., Evergreen Marine (Hong Kong) Ltd., Italia Marittima S.p.A. and Evergreen Marine (Singapore) Pte. Ltd., as one of the world’s leading transportation giant. In addition to this, the company is responsible for developing new markets in The Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership (RCEP) countries. RCEP-a free trade agreement between the Asia-Pacific nations that account for 30 percent of the global economy, and 30 percent of the global population.

Evergreen Marine (Asia) Pte. Ltd. presently plans to time charter in seventeen (17) container vessels, with a total capacity of 134,220 TEUs. The company is responsible for developing new markets where ships hub in Singapore and in surrounding RCEP countries. The company is further investigating new regional/feeder services and alliances with other carriers in order to strengthen Evergreen Line’s ability to provide an improved range of services to its customers.
postedCompany.name: EVERGREEN MARINE (ASIA) PTE. LTD.
